_readme: Retrieval-quality gold set for the game-data RAG index.
Each case maps a player query to a SET of acceptable answers, keyed by className
(stable across enrichment/display-name changes). A query passes Hit@K if ANY
relevant className appears in the top-K results under the given type filter.
query    - the search text, phrased the way a player would type it
types    - entity-type filter mirroring the tool that would serve this query
relevant - className(s); ANY one in top-K = hit. Multiple = 'any of these is fine'
Authored cases below are written BLIND (from game knowledge, not the index text);
answer keys were resolved against the real index. The reddit-skim and observed-miss
slots are intentionally left for Daisy to fill with real player phrasing and real

categories.factual: Direct lookup of a specific entity's facts (a recipe, a building's stats, an item).
categories.relational: Cross-entity intent: what produces/consumes/unlocks X. Stresses the enrichment.
categories.synonym: Vague or non-canonical phrasing; tests semantic robustness to player vocabulary.
categories.progression: Tier / unlock / 'what next' questions. Should route to schematics.

queries.notes: Concrete item className is Desc_Cement_C; the recipe is Recipe_Concrete_C. Alternate concrete recipes also acceptable if we choose to broaden later.

queries.query: how much power does a constructor use
how much energy is in coal

queries.notes: Gotcha: Caterium Ingot's className is Desc_GoldIngot_C (legacy 'gold' naming). Good test that we resolve by display name, not className guesswork.
Late-game. Many 'frame' variants compete in embedding space (Modular, Heavy, Fused, Flexible) - tests precision among near-duplicates.
Late-game. Must beat Supercomputer / alternate computer recipes for the base Computer.
Late-game GOTCHA: Turbo Motor's item className is Desc_MotorLightweight_C (display name and className diverge completely). Retrieval must work off display/semantic content, not the className token.
Late-game GOTCHA: Radio Control Unit's item className is Desc_ModularFrameLightweight_C - a 'frame' className for a non-frame item. Strong test that enrichment text (not className) drives the match.
Late-game GOTCHA: a space elevator part stored as Recipe_SpaceElevatorPart_8_C - className gives no hint of the display name. Tier 9 complexity.
Late-game item lookup; must disambiguate from the base Computer (Desc_Computer_C).

GOTCHA: the base 'Turbofuel' recipe is classed Recipe_Alternate_Turbofuel_C (the className says 'Alternate', the display name is just 'Turbofuel'). Must not be out-ranked by Packaged/Unpackage Turbofuel or the various Turbo-* alternates. Retrieval must work off display/semantic content, not the className token.

The query that started this whole effort. Jetpack runs on PACKAGED fuels (Packaged Fuel, Packaged Liquid Biofuel, Packaged Turbofuel, Packaged Rocket Fuel, Ionized Fuel) - NOT solid biofuel (old verifier mislabeled this). Currently retrieves the Jetpack item itself; this case stays until that's fixed.

queries.query: what ore do I need for steel
queries.notes: Steel Ingot = Iron Ore + Coal. Either ore in top-K is a hit.

queries.query: what do I need to build a rotor
queries.notes: Rotor recipe ingredients are iron rod + screws; the recipe entity carries the ingredient list.
Alternates (Cast Screws, Steel Screws) are unlocked via hard-drive scans researched at the MAM - NOT milestones. Enrichment should describe these as hard-drive/MAM unlocks.
Real player vocabulary from a Turbofuel-strategy thread. Note: the base Turbofuel recipe is classed Recipe_Alternate_Turbofuel_C but displays as just 'Turbofuel'.

Real player vocabulary ('Heavy Encased Frame' is the display name of the alt HMF recipe). Complements prog-01: this is one of the alternates that out-ranks the true HMF milestone, so a direct-name query SHOULD hit it.

queries.query: TODO: observed-miss - any relational query you catch ADA fumbling in dogfooding
queries.notes: FILL ME with proven-hard cases.
Vague description of a Miner. Any miner tier is a hit.
Power slugs are stored as 'Crystal' classNames (Blue/Yellow/Purple). Any is a hit.

Verbatim Reddit title. 'HOR' = Heavy Oil Residue (community abbreviation, appears nowhere in game data). Primary = Alternate: Heavy Oil Residue recipe; byproduct = Plastic/Rubber recipes. Verbatim phrasing hits rank 1 but TIGHTLY (0.616 vs 0.600 for Iron Ore noise); the bare abbreviation ('what do I do with HOR') misses top-10 entirely - alias enrichment (Issue #6 wiki) is the fix for that. Guard case for abbreviation robustness.

queries.query: TODO: reddit-skim - 'red ore' or similar ambiguous color/shape description
queries.notes: FILL ME. 'red ore' is genuinely ambiguous - document the intended target(s) before labeling, or drop it.

queries.query: Could someone help me with the water pumps and coal generators?
queries.notes: Verbatim Reddit title. AMBIGUITY: players usually mean Pipeline Pump when they say 'water pump', but this post (extractors stopping/restarting as pipes fill, tripping coal generators) means Water Extractor - whose internal className is, confusingly, Build_WaterPump_C. Pipeline Pump is deliberately NOT in the answer key: retrieving only it would misdiagnose this post. Currently the TIGHTEST hit in the set (Water Extractor recipe at exactly rank 5; Pipeline Pump Mk.1 out-ranks it at 3) - a canary for any embedding/enrichment change. Same post says 'Mk2 drill' for Miner Mk.2 (drill->miner already covered by syn-01).

Heavy Modular Frame is unlocked by the milestone 'Industrial Manufacturing' = Schematic_5-2_C, Tier 6 (verified via unlockClassNames; tier agrees with the wiki). DO NOT 'fix' this className to 6-1 based on the number: the Schematic_X-Y number is a LEGACY internal id, NOT the tier (e.g. Schematic_6-1_C is 'Logistics Mk.4' at Tier 5). Always resolve by displayName + unlockClassNames against the index, never by the className number.

queries.query: how do I unlock the assembler
queries.notes: Assembler is unlocked by 'Part Assembly' (Tier 2, Schematic_2-1_C). Verified via unlockClassNames.

queries.query: when can I start making steel
queries.notes: 'Basic Steel Production' (Tier 3) unlocks steel.
'Coal Power' milestone (Tier 3).

queries.query: what milestone gives me oil processing
queries.notes: 'Oil Processing' milestone (Tier 5).
